item.description:
如果处理不成功，可能会使生活变得绝望。 然而，通过正确的补充，它往往会在这一点上变成一些不是问题的东西。

它促进了宁静的休息和饮食模式的调整，特别是对于糖尿病患者。

相关文章： - GlucoTrust 评论（2022 年更新）- 血糖补充剂骗局还是什么？

到目前为止，GlucoTrust 的客户没有透露任何后遗症。 由于该物品在很大程度上是由常规成分制成的，因此您不必担心任何关键的次要效果。 假设您未满 18 岁、怀孕或患有任何疾病，您可能会受到轻微的附带影响。

生物素是 GlucoTrust 的基本组成部分。 它可以促进坚实的头发和皮肤，对肝容量和视力起作用。 这种固定有助于加速碳水化合物、脂肪和蛋白质的消化。 由于它们的消化速度加快，身体就会有更多的能量。

锰：锰是一种胰岛素增能剂，这意味着它有助于在一段时间后将葡萄糖转化为能量。 正如对该问题的研究所表明的那样，锰给感官系统带来了一种有价值的印象。

铬的：铬可能会提升一个人的消化能力，让一个人更快地消耗更多的卡路里。

肉桂：肉桂促进吸收。 它具有缓解和对抗细菌的特性。 它标准化脉冲电平。

甘草：几千年来，甘草根在不同的人类进步中被用于修复不同的疾病，这并不奇怪。 甘草根和 GlucoTrust 中的每一种黄酮类化合物都被铭记以帮助抑制饥饿感，从而有效地减轻体重。

它们的癌症预防剂特性有助于支持安全框架。 从现在到无限期的未来，Juniper Berries 一直被竞争对手用来进一步发展执行力和不同的优势。

锌：锌在定义中以下列总和的形式提供。 其基本目标是扩大胰腺输送的胰岛素量。

由于葡萄糖是能量的基本来源，因此缺乏葡萄糖会导致疾病和其他医疗问题。 同样，过量的葡萄糖同样会产生一些问题，如糖尿病。 因此，我们想弄清楚我们血糖水平的平衡，这样我们就可以在每天的日程安排中几乎没有问题。

现在让我们研究一下 GlucoTrust 的功能。 这些成分对 Gymnemates、生物素、锰、铬、肉桂油、锌和甘草甜素有腐蚀性。 这些成分可以帮助您保持体内葡萄糖水平。 了解 GlucoTrust 的运作非常重要，因此您可以在这些项目的帮助下调查自己的繁荣。

通过减少胰岛素的对抗，您的葡萄糖将更有效地分离并转化为能量。 血小板会保留更多的葡萄糖，并且不会直接进入您的循环系统。 此外， GlucoTrust 成分的第二种工作方式是防止淀粉分解。

在化合物的帮助下，碳水化合物分解发生在小消化道中。 这些化学物质被称为胰淀粉酶，它们将糖和碳水化合物分开。 因此，发生葡萄糖的排列。 从那时起，葡萄糖可以再次保留在循环系统中。 尽管如此，GlucoTrust 及其成分可以防止这种情况发生。

如您所知，GlucoTrust 包含一种非常强大的修复方法，称为 licoricey root extricate。 它通过降低胰腺分泌胰腺淀粉酶的速度来控制固体葡萄糖水平。 此外，去除甘草根还有助于输送胰岛素化学物质以控制体内存在的葡萄糖。 从那时起，它还可以减少刺激，从而保护您的血小板并杀死任何可能发生的疾病。

使用 GlucoTrust 的优势

毫无疑问，GlucoTrust 可以通过多种方式改善您的健康。 它有许多您真正想知道的优点，因此您可以弄清楚 GlucoTrust 的完整性。 以下是使用 GlucoTrust 的优势

  • 提高固体葡萄糖水平

这是 GlucoTrust 的主要优势。 提高固体葡萄糖水平的能力可以指导 GlucoTrust 提供的任何剩余优势。 它可以防止碳水化合物和糖分被你的循环系统消耗掉。 跟上血糖水平有助于糖尿病患者正在经历的那些问题。 消费 GlucoTrust 可以消除患糖尿病的风险，前提是个人目前还没有患糖尿病。

  • 对心血管健康起作用

随后，您将免受冠状动脉衰竭、肥胖、中风、高血压和其他心血管疾病的影响。 此外，您会遇到体内正常血流的不同优势，例如，在一天中充满活力、热情，以及具有强烈的新陈代谢反应。

  • 减少对低质量食物的渴望

由于您不会吃太多，因此您不会不幸摄入过多的糖作为碳水化合物。 因此，您将获得良好的葡萄糖水平。 如果您吃了大量劣质食物，它往往会对您的血液和葡萄糖水平产生负面影响。 因此，减少不健康食品的消费意义重大。 因此，GlucoTrust 保证您不会因为通常会扼杀您对食物的欲望而大吃一惊。

  • 推进声音同化和血液传播

因此，您的身体会遇到固体葡萄糖水平和良好的消化。 这将消除您与同化有关的全部问题，例如由胃部破裂引起的阻塞，不幸的无懈可击的框架和肿胀。 从那时起，您将适当地分开食物，因为您拥有框架的主要优势领域。 此外，您会感到更加热情并获得理想的幸福感。

假设您是一个经常与休息作斗争的人，而不是您想抓住的机会，那么 GlucoTrust 可以在这一点上为您提供帮助。 进一步提高休息质量不是 GlucoTrust 的专长，但它是固体葡萄糖的副作用及其成分的影响。 此外，GlucoTrust 中的铬还可以消除紧张和压力。 随后，您将始终如一地获得深刻而恢复活力的休息。

这些是 GlucoTrust 的主要优势，假设您定期服用 GlucoTrust，您将获得这些优势。 您可以通过 GlucoTrust 进一步提高您的血糖水平以及众多不同的优势。 所以今天从他们的权威网站上给自己买一壶 GlucoTrust。

如果您遵循 GlucoTrust 的合法测量，则不应面临任何重大的附带影响。 在任何情况下，对物品的测量处理不当都会引发不同的医疗问题。

如果您不遵循 GlucoTrust 的合法测量值，那么，在这一点上，您很可能会对您的身体造成不安全的影响。 拥有大量任何东西都会伤害您，而GlucoTrust 也是如此。 您的血糖可能会升高，而您的胰岛素无法适应。 随后，该项目可以建立患糖尿病的可能性，而不是放弃它。 跟上您的血糖水平至关重要，如果您适当地遵循测量结果，这是可以想象的。

除此之外，假设您经历任何严重疾病的不良影响，您不应该使用 GlucoTrust。 无论您是否可以使用GlucoTrust，您都可以不断寻求大师指导并了解。 从那时起，假设您未满 18 岁或怀孕，您可能会面临轻微的次要影响。 附带的影响可能很温和，并且可能会持续很短的时间。 在任何情况下，预防此类后遗症并遵循更常规的技术来进一步提高您的血糖水平是更明智的做法。

优点

  • 购买 GlucoTrust 的客户有 180 天的无条件承诺策略。
  • 它提供了范围广泛的成分，同样提高了质量休息。
  • 客户可以通过他们的精英团体优惠留出大量现金。

缺点

item.title: 分享一个有用的 Python 在线编辑器 | Share a Useful Python Online Editor
item.description:
开放黑客

发表于原文： https ://lwebapp.com/en/python-online

介绍

有的朋友可能听说过PyScript，知道Python可以打包成wasm运行在浏览器端。 做一些需要Python做的功能，可以直接在浏览器中完成，无需与服务器交互。 打开开发者的想象力。

我们这里要推荐的是一款同样支持Python代码执行的在线工具，一款在线Python代码编辑器

如何使用 Python Playground 工具？

  1. 从其他地方复制Python代码，粘贴到Python Playground工具左侧的编辑区，或者直接输入你的Python代码
  2. 单击顶部的Run按钮以执行代码
  3. 右侧区域会立即显示Python代码的运行结果，点击Clear按钮清除运行结果
  4. 您可以复制或下载您的 Python 代码

什么是 Python？

项目的开发。

为什么要学习 Python？

  1. 丰富的第三方库，满足您几乎所有的开发需求
  2. 活跃的开发社区，详细的开发文档、指南、教程

为什么使用 Python Playground？

  1. 打开浏览器写Python代码，不用安装本地Python环境直接使用离开
  2. 在浏览器端运行Python代码，无需与服务器交互，响应速度快
  3. 帮助初学者快速学习 Python 语法
  4. 支持 Python 3.10
  5. 支持快速复制或下载您的代码

结论

以上就是我对lwebapp.com网站推出的Python在线编辑器的介绍。 本工具仍在迭代中，欢迎提出宝贵意见。

参考

  • 分享一个有用的 Python 在线编辑器



原文:

openHacking

Posted on May 13

Original: https://lwebapp.com/en/python-online

Introduction

Some friends may have heard of PyScript, and know that Python can be packaged into wasm and run on the browser side. To do some functions that require Python to do, can be done directly in the browser without interacting with the server. Open the developer imagination.

What we want to recommend here is an online tool that also supports the execution of Python code, an online Python code editor

Python online editor address: https://lwebapp.com/en/python-playground

How to use Python Playground tool?

  1. Copy the Python code from other places, paste it into the editing area on the left side of the Python Playground tool, or directly enter your Python code
  2. Click the Run button at the top to execute the code
  3. The right area will immediately display the running results of the Python code, click the Clear button to clear the running results
  4. You can copy or download your Python code

What is Python?

Python was designed in the early 1990s by Guido van Rossum of the Netherlands Society for Mathematics and Computer Science as an alternative to a language called ABC. Python provides efficient high-level data structures, as well as simple and efficient object-oriented programming. Python syntax and dynamic typing, as well as the nature of an interpreted language, make it a programming language for scripting and rapid application development on most platforms. development of the project.

Why learn Python?

  1. Python syntax is simple and easy to learn
  2. Python lets you build more functionality with less code
  3. Python is cross-platform and open source
  4. Python can do web backend, web crawler, office automation, data analysis, artificial intelligence, automated testing, desktop applications, etc.
  5. Rich third-party libraries to meet almost all your development needs
  6. Active development community, detailed development documents, guides, tutorials

Why use Python Playground?

  1. Open the browser to write Python code, just use it and leave without installing a local Python environment
  2. Run Python code on the browser side, no need to interact with the server, and the response is fast
  3. Help beginners learn Python syntax quickly
  4. Support Python 3.10
  5. Support to quickly copy or download your code

Conclusion

The above is the my introduction to the Python online editor launched by the lwebapp.com website. This tool is still under iteration, and your valuable comments are welcome.

  • lwebapp.com
  • Python Online Editor
  • Share a Useful Python Online Editor

item.title: 如何在 ubuntu 中安装 pimcore 社区版？ | How to install pimcore community edition in ubuntu?
item.description:
病态虐待狂

发表于如何在 Ubuntu 20.04 中安装 PIMCORE

我会尽量减少这个过程。 因此，我将避免一些非强制性但建议将 Pimcore 用于生产环境的配置。

检查要求确保您已安装以下扩展。 对系统中不可用的每个扩展重复此过程。 确保您的系统上安装了数据库。

跳过这一步你已经安装了数据库

更改您希望 pimcore 安装所在的目录。 例如：

cd /your/project

  1. 确保您已安装 composer 并可从您的路径使用。

如果您已经在系统上安装了 composer，请跳过此步骤

wget -O composer-setup.php https://getcomposer.org/installer && sudo php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
  1. 使用 composer 创建我们的第一个 pimcore 项目。

COMPOSER_MEMORY_LIMIT=-1 composer create-project your_project_name_here

  1. 设置数据库（MySQL）（注意：如果您使用的是其他数据库，请查看它们各自的文档。 ）
  • 创建数据库和新的用户凭据

sudo chown mysql:mysql -R /var/lib/mysql

你到达这里没有错误吗？ 检查 pimcore 是否正常工作将目录更改为项目的根目录。

$php -S localhost:9000

在您喜欢的浏览器中打开localhost:9000 。 如果一切顺利，您将看到正在显示的网页。

要访问仪表板，请使用 pimcore-install 期间创建的管理员凭据登录到localhost:9000/admin 。



原文:

Sick Sadist

Posted on May 13

How to install PIMCORE in Ubuntu 20.04

I will try to keep the process as minimal as possible. So, I will avoid some configuration that is not mandatory but recommended to use Pimcore for production environment.

Check for requirements Make sure you have the following extensions installed. (mysql, iconv, dom, xml, gd, exif, mbstring, zlib, zip, intl, opcache, curl) Hint:

sudo apt update

sudo apt install php-mysql -y

Repeat this process for each extensions not available in your system . (You can check for the all the installed extension using following command.

php -m

  1. Make sure you have database installed on your system.

Skip this step you have already installed database

(I will use mysql for this purpose) To install mysql

sudo apt install mysql

  1. Change the directory where you want your pimcore installation to be located. For example:

cd /your/project

  1. Make sure you have composer installed and available from your path.

Skip this step if you have already installed composer on your system

wget -O composer-setup.php https://getcomposer.org/installer && sudo php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
  1. Creating our first pimcore project using composer.

COMPOSER_MEMORY_LIMIT=-1 composer create-project your_project_name_here

  1. Setting up database(MySQL) (Note: If you are using another database, look into their respective documentation.)
  • Creating database and a new user credentials

sudo chown mysql:mysql -R /var/lib/mysql

(This command changes the ownership of /var/lib/mysql directory recursively to mysql. )

sudo systemctl restart mysql

sudo mysql -u root -p
mysql> CREATE DATABASE yourdbname CHARSET=utf8mb4;
mysql> CREATE USER 'username'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'password';
mysql> GRANT ALL ON yourdbname.* TO 'username'@'localhost';

Installation of pimcore: (Make sure you are inside the project's directory) Run the following command: You should try one of the two (interactive or non-interactive) based on your preferences.

@Interactive
./vendor/bin/pimcore-install
(An interactive prompt will be generated where you need to provide credentials used by pimcore)

@NonInteractive
./vendor/bin/pimcore-install --admin-username adminuser --admin-password adminpass --mysql-username username --mysql-password password --mysql-database yourdbname --no-interaction

Have you reached here without errors? (NOTE: IF YOU DON'T UNDERSTAND, IGNORE THE FOLLOWING CODEBLOCK)

If (error_encountered)
then
    Debug error with the help of errors logged at var/log
    If(failed_to_debug) then
 mail the log info to this address: purshottam.nepal@javra.com (I will try my best to help you)
    EndIf
Else then
 Congratulation! You have made it to the end. Your installation is successful.
EndIf

Check whether pimcore is working Change the directory to project's root.

$php -S localhost:9000

Open localhost:9000 in your favorite browser. If everything goes right, you will see a webpage being displayed.

To access dashboard, login to localhost:9000/admin with admin credentials created during pimcore-install.
item.author: prunepal333

然而，只需一点点研究和努力，您就可以乘坐 Spirit Airlines 而不会将您的银行账户扔到公共汽车下——这不是双关语！ 在如何制作 Spirit Airlines 航班预订指南中，我们将涵盖从寻找最佳航班到避免 Spirit 的无数费用以及确保您按时到达需要的地方的所有内容。 让我们开始吧！

一个介绍
旅行有很多不同的方面。 当您计划旅行时，必须考虑几件事：时间、舒适度、风景以及您的口袋能负担得起的东西。 如果您需要价格实惠且方便的东西， Spirit Airlines 航班预订可能是您的不错选择。 这家航空旅行公司以无与伦比的价格提供优质服务。 然而，预订精神航空公司的航班不仅仅是点击几个按钮。 幸运的是，我们已经创建了一些简单的步骤，可以帮助您毫无问题地完成它！

第 1 步：输入您的详细信息
如果您想预订 Spirit 航空公司的航班，您需要掌握某些详细信息。 首先，提供您的姓名和电子邮件地址以在 Spirit Airlines 创建一个帐户。 注册帐户后，请提供您的出生日期、性别和处理 Spirit 航班预订所需的其他信息。 您的年龄决定了您在通过 Spirit 航空公司预订的航班上获得的折扣类型。

第 2 步：选择您的航班行程
登录您的 Spirit Airline Flights 帐户以查看可用的航班时间。 决定何时旅行后，单击查找 Spirit 预订航班，选项列表将按时间顺序显示。 最好选择清晨的航班，因为大多数航班比白天晚些时候或晚上的航班便宜。 但是，这将意味着在往返目的地的路上花费更多时间，具体取决于您是在国际旅行还是在国内旅行。 此外，考虑 Spirit Airlines 预订有多次中转的航班； 虽然比直接旅行要花更长的时间，但Spirit Flight Booking这样的旅行总体上要便宜得多。

第三步：选择座位
这意味着您必须在 Spirit 预订您的航班之前选择座位。 在撰写本文时，Spirit 为国内航班提供多种座位分类： 标准座位：付费后，您可以在出发前 24 小时在 Spirit Airlines 办理登机手续或在 Spirit 的移动应用程序上选择座位。 您可以选择经济舱中的任何可用座位（第 1 排和第 11 排）并拨打电话号码 Spirit Airlines 。 明智地选择，因为一旦您选择了您的座位，在出发前一小时开始办理登机手续之前，无法再更改它们 - 如果您错过了那个窗口，您的座位安排不会改变。

第 4 步：选择附加组件
完成 Spirit Airlines 航班预订后，您可以从一系列附加服务中进行选择。 所有预订都包含某些附加内容，例如分配座位和 10 公斤 Spirit 行李限额。 但是，还有一些可选的附加功能需要额外付费，但如果它们适合您的需要，可能值得考虑。 请注意，只有少数几家航空公司已经开始这样做，大多数航空公司向您收取单程 10 至 25 美元的费用，以便为每人携带一个以上的 Spirit 行李保单。



原文:

Spirit Airlines is notorious for its low fares, high fees, and nickel-and-diming customers. However, with just a little research and effort, you can fly Spirit Airlines without throwing your bank account under the bus – no pun intended! In this how to make a Spirit Airlines flight booking guide, we’ll cover everything from finding the best flights to avoiding Spirit’s myriad fees to making sure you get to where you need to go on time and in one piece. Let’s get started!

An Introduction
There are many different aspects to travel. When you are planning a trip, there are several things that must be taken into consideration: time, comfort, scenery and what your pockets can afford. If you need something affordable and convenient, Spirit Airlines Flight Booking might be a good option for you. This air travel company provides excellent services for an unbeatable price. However, there is more to booking spirit airlines flights than just clicking on a couple of buttons. Luckily for you we have created a few easy steps that will help guide you through it without any problems at all!

Step 1: Enter your details
If you want to make a Spirit airlines flight booking, there are certain details you need to have handy. First, provide your name and email address to create an account with Spirit Airlines. Once you’ve signed up for an account, provide your date of birth, gender and other information necessary for processing Spirit flight reservations. Your age determines what type of discount you receive on flights booked through Spirit airlines.

Step 2: Choose your flight itinerary
Log into your Spirit Airline Flights account to view available flight times. Once you’ve decided when you want to travel, click find Spirit book flights and a list of options will appear in chronological order. It is best to choose an early morning flight as most of these are cheaper than those that occur later in the day or at night. However, it will mean spending more time on your way to or from your destination, depending on whether you are traveling internationally or domestically. Additionally, consider Spirit Airlines booking a flight that has several layovers; although it will take longer than traveling directly, Spirit Flight Booking such a trip is much cheaper overall.

Step 3: Select your seats
Seats on Spirit Airlines are all first-come, first-served. That means you’ll have to select a seat before Spirit booking your flight. At time of writing, Spirit offers several seat classifications for domestic flights: Standard Seat: For a fee, you can select a seat at Spirit Airlines check-in or on Spirit’s mobile app up to 24 hours before departure. You can pick any available seat in economy (on both rows 1 and 11) and call at Phone Number Spirit Airlines. Choose wisely because once you’ve selected your seats, they can no longer be changed until check-in Spirit begins one hour before departure—and if you miss that window, there’s no changing your seating arrangements.

Step 4: Choose add-ons
Once you’ve made your Spirit Airlines Flight booking, you can choose from a range of add-ons. There are certain add-ons which are included in all bookings, such as allocated seating and 10kg Spirit baggage allowance. However, there are also a number of optional extras which cost extra but might be worth considering if they suit your needs. Spirit Airline website has recently been offering some very appealing offers on these extras such as allowing passengers to upgrade their bag to carry on their carry-on luggage at no extra charge. Note that only a few airlines have started doing so, with most charging you between $10-$25 each way to carry on more than one Spirit bag policy per person.

item.title: 销售视频游戏的 5 大平台 | Top 5 Platforms For Selling Video Games
item.description:
同时，创建游戏既冒险又忙碌，我们在创建游戏的过程中非常忙碌，从设计图形、编写代码、添加语音和视频，不胜枚举。 但是，我们的工作能得到合适的报酬吗？

出售您的游戏并提供最佳收益的网站较少，我们已经取消了前 5 家在线市场商店，您可以在这些商店在线销售您的游戏。

游戏营销机构
当您对价格感到满意并同意出售时，他们将直接向您发送快递服务。 在产品到达 Decluttr 的仓库并满足他们的期望后，decluttr 将在第二天自行完成付款。

亚马逊

亚马逊是一个巨大的电子商务平台，确切地说，它是世界上最大的市场主导市场。 从家庭到科技，您可以通过亚马逊购买或出售任何东西。 如果您想销售您的游戏甚至游戏机，亚马逊是一个很棒的平台，可以推广您的产品并获得销售。 您所要做的就是在亚马逊上创建一个卖家账户，完成必要的步骤，并使用正确的营销策略将您的游戏出售给大量观众。

应用商店

它拥有全球观众，拥有智能手机的每个人都可以访问 Playstore，这为您的视频游戏提供了最大的销售平台。 通过与合适的游戏营销机构合作，您的 Play 商店中的视频游戏将得到推广，并在 Play 商店中被更多人看到。 通过 Play Store 上的游戏，您将获得游戏评论并发布更新，这会提高参与度，甚至进一步帮助您构建更好的游戏。

他们是美国最大的游戏网络之一，他们主要购买电子产品和游戏。 游戏机和视频游戏是他们的首要任务。 他们也有零售商店，如果您想将视频游戏出售到他们的网站上，请获取报价，如果您对他们的交易感到满意，您可以前往他们的线下商店，或者您也可以在线销售您的视频游戏。

脸书市场

您也可以直接与买家互动并查看他们的个人资料。 可以使用他们的移动应用程序轻松制作列表。 您可以在 Facebook 市场上出价并出售给您想要的人。
这些是一些疯狂的市场，可以为您的视频游戏带来价值并提高您作为游戏创作者的技能。



原文:


Creating a game is adventurous & hectic at the same time, we hussle a lot while creating one, from designing the graphics, writing codes, adding voice & videos, the list goes on. But, do we get the right pay for our work?

There are fewer websites to sell your game that offer the best money, we have brought down top 5 online market stores where you can sell your games online.

game marketing agency
Declutter is a place where you can sell your games, smartphones, Dvds, CDs, Blue ray disks, books, tech softwares, tech hardwares etc. Here you can get a quote beforehand as well, just enter the details of the barcode of the game or details for other products you wanna sell and you will get a quote instantly. When you are satisfied with the price & agree to sell, they will send their courier services directly to you. After the product gets to Declutter’s warehouse & meets their expectations the payment will be done by decluttr on the following day itself.

Amazon

Amazon is a huge e-commerce platform, to say precisely it is the world’s largest marketplace that is dominating markets. From household to tech you can buy anything or sell anything through amazon. If you want to sell your game or even gaming consoles, amazon is an awesome platform to promote your product and get sold. All you have to do is create a seller account on amazon, finish the necessary steps, and use the right marketing tactics to get your game sold to a huge audience.

Play-Store

The Play Store is an awesome place to sell your mobile video games. It has a worldwide audience, everyone who owns a smartphone will have access to playstore, this provides you the biggest platform for your video game to get sold. By partnering with the right game marketing agency your video-game in play store will get promoted and get visible to more people on the play store. Play store is one of the biggest platforms to sell your game online.
With your game on play store you will get reviews for your game and can release updates too, this results in engagement and even further help you to build better games.

*Game Stop
*

Game stop is an American video game, consumer electronics & game merchandise retailer company built in texas. They are one of USA’s largest gaming networks, they buy mostly electronic used items and games. Gaming consoles & video games are their priority. They have retail shops as well, if you want to sell your video game head over to their website get the quote and if you are satisfied with their deal you can head on to their offline store or you can sell your video game online too.

Facebook Marketplace

With more than 1 billion people on facebook, its marketplace has a higher visibility. The advantage of facebook marketplace is you will know to whom you're selling to. You can directly interact with the buyers and view their profiles too. Listings can be made easily with their mobile app. You can place biddings on Facebook marketplace and sell to the ones you wish.
These are some crazy marketplaces that can bring value to your video games and enhance your skills as a game creator.

item.title: 重复参数 | Duplicate Arguments
item.description:
给定 N 个参数，编写一个函数CheckArgsDuplicates以确定其参数是否有重复项。

想法：

  • 对于这样的问题，确实存在 JavaScript 中的单行代码
  • 由于不需要计算重复的数量，一旦它存在于哈希中，我们返回 true
 // Time complexity - O(n) // Space complexity - O(n) function CheckArgsDuplicates (... args ) { const argumentz = [... args ]; const argsLength = argumentz . length ; let argCounter = {}; for ( let i = 0 ; i < argsLength ; i ++ ) { if ( argCounter [ argumentz [ i ]]) return true ; argCounter [ argumentz [ i ]] = 1 ; } return false ; } // one-liner solution which should only be used as naive solution function CheckArgsDuplicates (... args ) { return Array . from ( new Set ( args )). length !== args . length ; }



原文:

1 Valid Numeric Anagram 2 Duplicate Arguments

Given N number of arguments, write a function CheckArgsDuplicates to determine if its arguments have any duplicate.

Thoughts:

  • One-liner in JavaScript does exist for such question
  • Since it is not needed to count the number of duplicates, once it exist in the hash we return true 
// Time complexity - O(n)
// Space complexity - O(n)
function CheckArgsDuplicates(...args) { const argumentz = [...args]; const argsLength = argumentz.length; let argCounter = {}; for (let i=0; i<argsLength; i++) { if (argCounter[argumentz[i]]) return true; argCounter[argumentz[i]] = 1; } return false;
} // one-liner solution which should only be used as naive solution
function CheckArgsDuplicates(...args) { return Array.from(new Set(args)).length !== args.length;
}
item.author: henryong92

item.title: 呼叫、绑定和应用 - 三位一体 | Call, Bind and Apply - The Trinity
item.description:
当我第一次遇到这些术语时，我非常困惑和无能为力。 这些有何不同？ 函数借用！？ 这是我尝试分享我到目前为止所学到的东西！
注意：本博客假设您对这个关键字有基本的了解。

定义

函数借用

它允许我们在另一个对象上使用一个对象的方法，而无需在多个地方创建副本或重写它。

称呼（）

申请（）

它类似于 call()，唯一的区别是 call() 单独接受所有参数，而 apply() 接受像对象一样的数组作为参数。

绑定（）

为什么首先要使用这些？

让我们举个例子来了解何时以及为什么要使用这些方法。

  • 首先要做的事情：我们知道如何访问一个普通的 Object 属性。
 const userList = { user: "Aditi", age: 25 }; //accessing the properties console.log(`Hi ${userList.user}. How's ${userList.age} treating you?`); // output // Hi Aditi. How's 25 treating you?

现在假设我们在 userList 中有一个方法。

 const userList = { user: "Aditi", age: 25, printDetails: function(){ console.log(`Hi ${this.user}. How's ${this.age} treating you?`); } }; // output // Hi Aditi. How's 25 treating you?

现在如果我们调用userList.printDetails(); 我们得到相同的输出。

现在假设我们有另一个对象adminList并且我们想要访问printDetails()方法。 现在做什么？ 你可以说我们可以创建另一个具有不同值的对象并复制 printDetails() 方法来访问它。

 const adminList = { user: "Ananya", age: 26, printDetails: function(){ console.log(`Hi ${this.user}. How's ${this.age} treating you?`); } }; // output // Hi Ananya. How's 26 treating you?

听起来不错？ 现在假设您的应用程序增长了，并且您拥有更多数量的对象。 您需要在所有对象中复制并重复此方法。 也可能存在方法数量也增加的情况。

所以，为了避免重复，我们应该使用这些函数借用方法！

如何使用这些方法？

现在让我们了解如何解决上述问题。

使用调用（）

 const userList = { user: "Aditi", age: 25, printDetails: function (city, country) { console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}. How's ${this.age} treating you?` ); } }; const adminList = { user: "Ananya", age: 26 }; // borrowing printDetails() using call() userList.printDetails.call(adminList, "Patna", "India"); // output // Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

使用应用（）

 const userList = { user: "Aditi", age: 25, printDetails: function (city, country) { console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}. How's ${this.age} treating you?` ); } }; const adminList = { user: "Ananya", age: 26 }; // borrowing printDetails() using apply() userList.printDetails.apply(adminList, ["Patna", "India"]); // output // Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

使用绑定（）

 const userList = { user: "Aditi", age: 25, printDetails: function (city, country) { console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}. How's ${this.age} treating you?` ); } }; const adminList = { user: "Ananya", age: 26 }; // borrowing printDetails() using bind() const printAdminDetails = userList.printDetails.bind( adminList, "Patna", "India" ); printAdminDetails(); // output // Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

因此，无需复制第二个对象adminlist中的printDetails() ，我们就可以在 call()、apply() 和 bind() 的帮助下访问该方法。

概括

  • 参考

    姆文德瓦·本迪·艾玛 - May 10 5月10日



原文:

When I first came across these terms, I was super confused and clueless. How are these different from each other? Function borrowing!? - What does that even mean?

Here's my attempt to share what I have learned so far!
Note: This blog assumes you have a basic understanding of this keyword.

Definition

Function borrowing

It allows us to use methods of an object on another object without having to create a copy or rewrite it in several places.

call()

call() is used to invoke a method.
syntax- call(thisArg, arg1,arg2, ...., argN)

apply()

apply() is also used to invoke a method. It is similar to call(), with the only difference that call() takes all the arguments individually, while apply() take array like object as an argument.

syntax- apply(thisArg,[arg1,agr2,...,agrN])

bind()

bind() creates a new function which can be invoked somewhere later when needed.
syntax- bind(thisArg, arg1,arg2, ...., argN)

Why to even use these in the first place?

Let's take an example to understand when and why to use these methods.

  • First things first: We know how to access a normal Object property. 
const userList = {
  user: "Aditi",
  age: 25
};
//accessing the properties
console.log(`Hi ${userList.user}. How's ${userList.age} 
treating you?`);

// output
// Hi Aditi. How's 25 treating you?

Now let's suppose we have a method inside userList.

const userList = {
  user: "Aditi",
  age: 25,
printDetails: function(){
console.log(`Hi ${this.user}. How's ${this.age} 
treating you?`);
}
};
// output
// Hi Aditi. How's 25 treating you?

Now if we call userList.printDetails(); we get the same output.

Now suppose we have another object adminList and we want to access the printDetails() method. What to do now? You can say we can create another object with a different value and copy the printDetails() method to access it.

const adminList = {
  user: "Ananya",
  age: 26,
printDetails: function(){
console.log(`Hi ${this.user}. How's ${this.age} 
treating you?`);
}
};

// output
// Hi Ananya. How's 26 treating you?

Sounds good? Now suppose your app grows, and you have more numbers of objects. You would need to copy and repeat this method in all your objects. There also might be a case where the number of methods increases too.

So, to avoid repetition we should use these function borrowing methods!

How to use these methods?

Now let's understand how to solve the above-discussed problem.

Using call() 

const userList = {
  user: "Aditi",
  age: 25,
  printDetails: function (city, country) {
    console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}.
    How's ${this.age} treating you?`
    );
  }
};
const adminList = {
  user: "Ananya",
  age: 26
};

// borrowing printDetails() using call()

userList.printDetails.call(adminList, "Patna", "India");

// output
// Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

Using apply() 

const userList = {
  user: "Aditi",
  age: 25,
  printDetails: function (city, country) {
    console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}.
    How's ${this.age} treating you?`
    );
  }
};
const adminList = {
  user: "Ananya",
  age: 26
};

// borrowing printDetails() using apply()

userList.printDetails.apply(adminList, ["Patna", "India"]);

// output
// Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

Using bind() 

const userList = {
  user: "Aditi",
  age: 25,
  printDetails: function (city, country) {
    console.log(`Hi ${this.user} from ${city}, ${country}.
    How's ${this.age} treating you?`
    );
  }
};
const adminList = {
  user: "Ananya",
  age: 26
};

// borrowing printDetails() using bind()

const printAdminDetails = userList.printDetails.bind(
  adminList,
  "Patna",
  "India"
);

printAdminDetails();

// output
// Hi Ananya from Patna, India. How's 26 treating you?

So, without having to copy the printDetails() inside the second object adminlist we were able to access the method with the help of call(), apply() and bind().

Summary

  • call(), bind() and apply() are used to borrow methods of a object.
  • call() and apply() are invoked and executed immediately.
  • The difference between call() and apply() is the way they take arguments. call() takes all arguments separately while apply() takes arguments in an array.
  • bind() creates a new function which is executed later when invoked.

References

amirreza heydari - Apr 22

Mwendwa Bundi Emma - May 10

item.title: Bunzz 监控功能推出！ | Bunzz Monitoring Feature launched!
item.description:
正如我们路线图中所预期的那样，我们很高兴地宣布我们的监控功能已经在您的仪表板中可用，为您的 Dapp 提供分析系统。

将您的 Dapp 发布给最终用户后，我们的 SDK 将跟踪用户活动和存储信息，这些信息将可用并显示在 Bunzz Dashboard 部分。

监控功能包括：

  • 有关初始化计数的统计信息
  • 每个函数一天被调用多少次
  • 每天所有函数调用的汇总计数

注意：确保您的前端应用程序使用 bunzz-sdk 版本 1.1.1 或更高版本来获取分析。

登录您的 Bunzz 仪表板以在此处查看：

克里斯汀·金尼尔-奥尔曼 - Apr 18 4月18日



原文:

Bunzz is proud of over-delivering instead of promising.

As expected in our roadmap we are pleased to announce our MONITORING feature is already available in your dashboard, providing analytics system for your Dapp’s.

After publishing your Dapp to final users, our SDK will track users activity and store information, which will be available and shown on Bunzz Dashboard section.

Monitoring feature includes:

  • Statistics about the count of initializations
  • How many times each function was called by day
  • Summary count of all functions calls by day

Note: Make sure that your Frontend application uses bunzz-sdk version 1.1.1 or higher for getting analytics.

Sign in to your Bunzz dashboard to check it out here:

https://app.bunzz.dev/

Kristen Kinnear-Ohlmann - Apr 18
item.author: bunzzdev

item.title: 十大在线竞争编程平台评论 | Top 10 Online competitive programming platforms review
item.description:
当您刚开始成为一名有竞争力的程序员时，选择一名在线评委可能会有点令人生畏。 特别是有这么多。 但并非所有平台都是一样的。 虽然有些非常适合他们活跃的社区和定期比赛，但有些可能有一个有组织的有限但非常高质量的内容集合。 这就是为什么我要对 10 个常见的在线评委（竞争性编程平台）以及我使用它们的经验进行评论。

他们最好的部分是比赛非常频繁，并且拥有竞争激烈的编程世界中最活跃的社区之一。 对于将定期参加短期（2-3 小时）比赛的人来说，这个平台是最好的。 不利的一面是，由于比赛如此频繁，因此一直在添加大量问题。 有时，找到一组精心设计的问题供您练习会变得非常困难。

我喜欢他们每月一次的比赛（持续 2-3 天），我相信这是初学者学习的好地方，因为他们可以在没有时间用完的压力下思考问题。 他们也有很大的区域支持，因为大量的问题陈述以不同的语言出现。 有一些功能作为初学者的精选问题列表。 总体来说是一个完整的平台。 他们还经常为问题提供视频编辑/教程，使其成为学习者的绝佳平台。

但是有优秀的教程和问题集，可以熟练掌握不同的编程语言和基于主题的学习。 它更适合技术面试准备，而不是竞争性编程。 但是他们的 C++ 模块对我学习 C++ STL（标准模板库）非常有帮助。

仍然是一个优秀的平台。 特别是他们有一个有组织的问题集合，逐步涵盖几乎所有主题。 您可以在他们的 codemonk 功能下找到它。 它为初学者提供了一个总体路线图以及一个很好的练习问题列表。

特别是如果您参加 ACM ICPC，这可能是一个很好的资源。 他们的问题集合相对较少（大约只有 500 个），但每个问题都写得很好，经典而有趣。 每个问题都有一个很好的外卖课程。 他们的社论是开源的。 这意味着它们是社区驱动的，是开源贡献的绝佳场所。

在 Coder ：一个日语平台，但有很好的英语语言支持。 定期举办比赛，他们的问题陈述非常清晰、简洁、中肯。 对于正在与蛮力、实施问题或只是寻找简单问题来解决的初学者来说，这是一个很好的起点。 特别是为了简单地提高速度来解决那些非常简单的问题。

在线法官：以前称为UVA ，这个在线法官已经存在了相当长的时间。 他们有一些很好的问题，但平台本身非常老式，没有那么多功能。 一个缺点是他们的许多问题陈述都非常繁琐和令人困惑。 因此，除非您有来自该站点的精选问题列表，否则我个人不建议新程序员练习使用该站点。 有更好的选择。

法官对时间有点挑剔，而且很多时候你必须优化代码的每一毫秒。 但是，这会教您编写以您正在练习的任何语言快速编写的代码。

特别具有数学性质。 但在一般情况下并不是那么好。

但是在解决了大约 70-100 个问题之后，最好和更有效地转移到其他平台。

摘要：如果您是初学者， LightOj最适合基于目标主题的练习， Code Forces和Code Chef最适合常规比赛和一般练习， Hacker Rank最适合提高编程语言的熟练程度。

平台链接：

  • 代码力量
  • 代码厨师
  • 黑客等级
  • 黑客地球
  • 光氧
  • 在编码器
  • 紫外线A


原文:

When you are just starting out as a competitive programmer selecting one online judge can become a bit daunting. Specially with so many out there. But not all platforms are made the same. While some are excellent for their active community and regular contest , some might have an organized collection of limited but very high quality content. That's why I am writing a review on 10 common online judges(competitive programming platforms) and my experience using them.

Code Forces : By far the most popular online judge. Their best part is that contest are by all means very frequent and has one of the most active community in the competitive programming world. For people who will be taking part in short (2-3 hour) contest regularly this platform is the best. On the downside because the contests are so frequent a large number of problems are being added all the time. And finding a curated set of problem for you to practice becomes really tough at times.

Code Chef : Also holds frequent and regular contest. I loved their monthly long contest (last for 2-3 days) which I believe is a good place for beginner to learn as they can think about problems without the constant pressure of running out of time. They also have great regional support as a large number of problem statements come in different languages. Has some feature as lists of curated problems for beginners. Overall a complete platform. Also they often provide video editorial/tutorial for the problems making it an excellent platform for learners.

Hacker Rank : Contests aren't held with that much consistency. But has excellent tutorials and problem sets for gaining proficiency in different programming languages and topic based learning. Its more geared towards technical interview prep than for competitive programming. But their C++ module was immensely helpful for learning C++ STL (Standard Template Library) for me.

Hacker Earth : Regular contests for recruitment are held but not that many for pure and fun competitive programming. Still an excellent platform . Specially they have a organized collection of problems covering almost all topics step by step. You can find it under their codemonk feature. Which provides an overall roadmap for beginners as well as a good list of problems to practice on.

Light Oj : Best resource I found for topic based learning and problem solving. Specially if you are taking part in ACM ICPC this might prove to be a great resource. They have a relatively smaller collection of problems (around only 500) but each one is very well written, classic and fun problem. Each problem has a good take away lesson. Their editorials are opensource. Which means they are community driven and excellent place for opensource contributions.

At Coder : A Japanese platform but has good English language support. Holds regular contests and their problem statements are very clear , concise and to the point. For beginners who are struggling with brute force , implementation problems or just looking for easy problems to solve this is a good place to start. Specially for simply increasing speed for solving those really easy problems.

Online Judge : Previously known as UVA this online judge has been around for fairly long. They have some good problems but the platform itself is quite old fashioned and doesn't have that many features. One downside is that a lot of their problem statements are simply cumbersome and confusing. So, unless you have a list of curated problems from this site I personally don't recommend new programmers to practice using this site. There are simply better options.

SPOJ : Kind of old platform, but has quality problems. The judge is a bit fussy about time and quite often you have to optimize every millisecond out of your code. This however teaches you to writing code that writes really fast in whatever language you are practicing in.

Timus : Has good collection of problems. Specially of mathematical nature. But not that good in general cases.

Beecrowd : Previously known as URI online judge , is a good place for absolute newbies . But after solving about 70-100 problems is best and more efficient to move to other platforms.

Summary : If you are a beginner starting out than LightOj will be best for targeted topic based practicing, Code Forces and Code Chef for regular contests and general practicing , Hacker Rank for increasing proficiency in programming languages.

Platform links:

  • Code Forces
  • Code Chef
  • Hacker Rank
  • Hacker Earth
  • LightOj
  • At Coder
  • URI
  • UVA
item.author: sakib3201

item.title: Nghệ thuật dựng 组件 trong thực tế-Phần 3 | Nghệ thuật dựng component trong thực tế-Phần 3
item.description:
咻咻？ 潘氏海

披空？ Tôi thực sự thích sử dụng SVG cho trường hợp cụ thể như này. Tôi thực sự thích sử dụng SVG cho trường hợp cụ thể như này。

Hết phần 3 Hết phần 3



原文:

Bài viết được dịch từ:
https://ishadeed.com/article/building-real-life-components/

Nhiều hình đại diện trong trò chuyện nhóm

Trong trường hợp trò chuyện với nhiều người, khu vực hình đại diện sẽ có hai hình đại diện với mỗi hình đại diện được đặt lần lượt ở trên cùng bên phải và dưới cùng bên trái.

Để giữ cho một hình đại diện và nhiều hình đại diện được căn chỉnh, chúng ta cần đặt một kích thước cố định cho thẻ cha chứa nhiều hình đại diện.

.card__avatar {
  width: 56px;
  height: 56px;
}

Biến thể này yêu cầu thay đổi HTML, xem đoạn code HTML dưới.

<div class="card__avatar card__avatar--multiple">
  <svg
    class="avatar avatar-1"
    role="none"
    style="height: 36px; width: 36px"
  ></svg>
  <svg
    class="avatar avatar-2"
    role="none"
    style="height: 36px; width: 36px"
  ></svg>
  <div class="badge"></div>
</div>

.card__avatar--multiple {
  position: relative;
  width: 56px;
  height: 56px;
}

.card__avatar--multiple .avatar {
  position: absolute;
}

.card__avatar--multiple .avatar-1 {
  right: 0;
  top: 0;
}

.card__avatar--multiple .avatar-2 {
  left: 0;
  bottom: 0;
}

.card__avatar--multiple .badge {
  right: 6px;
  bottom: 6px;
}

Nội dung

Khu vực này là nơi người dùng có thể nhìn thấy tên của người mà họ đang trò chuyện và nội dung của tin nhắn hoặc hành động (không rõ lắm chắc là status).

Tôi có thể tưởng tượng phần code HTML này được chia thành hai phần, một phần cho nội dung văn bản (tên, tin nhắn hoặc hành động) và phần thứ hai cho chỉ báo ở phía bên phải (tin nhắn mới, đã xem, đã tắt tiếng, đã gửi).

Phần đầu tiên

Hãy cùng khám phá code HTML cho khu vực nội dung.

<div class="card__content">
  <div class="card__content__start">
    <h3>Ahmad Shadeed</h3>
    <div class="row">
      <p>You: Thanks, sounds good. What about doing a webinar, too?</p>
      <span class="separator">.</span>
      <time>8hr</time>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card__content__end">
    <!-- The indicator (new message, seen, muted, sent) -->
  </div>
</div>

.card__content {
  display: flex;
  flex: 1;
}

.card__content__start {
  display: flex;
  flex: 1;
}

.card__content__start .row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.card__content__end {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  margin-left: 12px;
}

.separator {
  margin-left: 4px;
  margin-right: 4px;
}

Với phần trên, khu vực nội dung sẽ giống như bên dưới (Đây là ảnh chụp màn hình được chụp từ Firefox).

Độ dài của tên hoặc tin nhắn có thể rất dài. Quan trọng là phải tính đến điều đó ngay từ đầu. Trước tiên, chúng ta hãy khám phá phương pháp "flow as you like".

Trong hình trên, nội dung thẻ thứ hai bao gồm nhiều dòng. Điều này có vẻ không tốt cho một component. Để tránh điều đó, đây là những thứ cần làm:

  • Đặt min-width: 0 trên các item con (dùng flex cho parent component). Vì sao? Tôi sẽ cho bạn biết sau đây.
  • Cắt bớt văn bản bằng cách sử dụng các thuộc tính overflow, white-space và text-overflow.

Tôi thêm code CSS cho phần Tên và ở thẻ p:

.card__content__start h3,
.card__content__start p {
  overflow-x: hidden;
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

Tuy nhiên, điều này không thể giải quyết vấn đề khi chúng ta đang sử dụng flexbox. Lưu ý kết quả sau khi áp dụng CSS ở trên:

Lý do là các flex items sẽ không thu nhỏ dưới kích thước nội dung tối thiểu của chúng. Để giải quyết vấn đề này, chúng ta cần đặt min-width: 0 trên các phần tử .card__content và card__content__start.

Phần thứ hai

Mỗi tin nhắn có một indicator (status) và chúng ta nên tính đến tất cả chúng. Đây là tất cả các indicator mà tôi biết. Có thể còn nhiều điều mà tôi không biết (Nếu có, vui lòng cho tôi biết).

Đối với phần này, chúng ta sẽ tập trung vào phần tử .card__content__end và nội dung bên trong của nó.

<div class="card__content">
  <div class="card__content__start">
    <!-- The name and message -->
  </div>
  <div class="card__content__end">
    <!-- The indicator (new message, seen, muted, sent) -->
  </div>
</div>

Bằng cách có một phần tử chung, bất kỳ component nào cũng có thể đặt trong nó. Phần tử .card__content__end không được có bất kỳ styles nào như color hoặc font, nó sẽ chỉ đóng vai trò là ngôi nhà cho một component cụ thể.

Tin nhắn mới

Trong khi kiểm tra cách Facebook thực hiện chỉ báo (indicator) tin nhắn mới, hóa ra đó là một button có nhãn “Mark as read”.

<div role="button" aria-label="Mark as read" tabindex="0"></div>

Tôi không hiểu bối cảnh tại sao nhóm tại Facebook lại chọn một phần tử div thay vì một phần tử button thực tế. Với button, chúng ta không cần sử dụng role, aria-label và tabindex. Thay vào đó, tất cả những thứ đó đều có sẵn miễn phí.

Hình đại diện Seen

Tương tự như hình đại diện của người dùng, hình đại diện Seen không có gì khác biệt. Nó sử dụng phần tử svg cho hình đại diện có nhãn aria-label cho biết tên của người dùng.


<svg aria-label="Ahmad Shadeed" role="img">
  <!-- Mask and image -->
</svg>

Nhiều hình đại diện Seen

Thành thật mà nói, đây là một trong những yêu thích của tôi. Tôi thực sự thích cách team tại Facebook thực hiện nó.

Bạn có nhận thấy đường viền giữa hai hình đại diện không? Ngay từ cái nhìn đầu tiên, bạn có thể nghĩ rằng đây là đường viền bởi CSS cho hình đại diện đầu tiên. Nếu bạn nghĩ như vậy, rất tiếc phải thông báo cho bạn biết rằng bạn đã sai (đúng như suy nghĩ ban đầu của tôi).

Điều này có được do áp dụng SVG mask.

<svg role="none">
  <mask id="circle">
    <circle cx="8" cy="8" fill="white" r="8"></circle>
    <circle cx="-4" cy="8" fill="black" r="10"></circle>
  </mask>

  <g mask="url(#circle)">
    <image></image>
    <circle class="border" cx="28" cy="28" r="28"></circle>
  </g>
</svg>

Đây là hình ảnh về cách hoạt động của nó.

Thật đáng kinh ngạc. Phải không? Tôi thực sự thích sử dụng SVG cho trường hợp cụ thể như này.

Hết phần 3
item.author: buiminh15

item.title: 测试 | test

item.author: ymdkysk_71

item.title: 质量保证计划 [QAP]：定义和大纲 | Quality Assurance Plan [QAP]: Definition & Outline
item.description:
发表于确保良好的产品和服务质量对于各个领域的公司都至关重要。 劣质产品可能会导致巨大的经济损失，甚至市场上的产品完全失败。 解决软件质量问题会增加您投资于软件的资金不会丢失的机会。

此外，客户的满意度取决于产品质量，进而也取决于您的品牌声誉。 对于SaaS 应用程序等基于云的产品，用户满意度是指定优先级的目标。 但是，如何始终确保高质量？ 我们知道， 优质产品的支柱是测试。 但是，如果我们制定质量保证计划，我们可以进一步提高质量。 我们收集了您需要了解的有关 QAP 以及如何开始自己创建它们的所有信息。

什么是质量保证计划？

质量保证计划或 QAP 是一种文件类型，用于确保成品或服务符合事先概述的标准，从而保持高质量。 换句话说，QAP 可以帮助企业为其产品建立统一的要求列表，然后制定一组特定的操作，必须执行这些操作才能满足这些要求或标准。 质量保证计划的创建是软件质量保证和测试服务的一部分。

在大多数情况下，产品或服务质量的标准或要求不仅是基于客户需求的标准或要求，也是基于业务目标和需求的标准或要求。 质量保证计划旨在在创建产品的过程中指导项目团队，同时帮助团队监控、评估和报告其质量。 因此，QAP 可用于向高级管理层报告正在制造的产品的质量和项目团队的进度。

使用 QAP 的一个关键方面是质量保证或 QA ，它包括帮助评估产品或服务是否符合预定义的质量标准、要求或标准的活动。 重要的是要记住，QA 与质量控制或 QC 不同，尽管两者都以不同的方式与 QAP 一起使用。 质量保证旨在预防问题，而质量控制则用于识别出现的上述问题（例如产品缺陷）。

使用质量保证计划有哪些优势？

如前所述，质量保证计划用于确保最终产品或服务的高质量。 但是，使用 QAP 还具有许多其他优势，包括：

  • 简化生产：质量保证计划使公司能够更好地组织其流程并简化大型企业系统的生产。 在某种程度上，拥有 QAP 可以让您通过剥离所有不必要的部分并专注于特定项目的基本方面来使您的流程更精简。 在实践中，这意味着您的项目团队将更好地控制流程并因此更加投入。 此外，还将有一个内部制衡系统，这将有助于确保所创造的产品或服务的质量。 所有的审计也可以更顺利地进行。
  • 改进的资源管理：使用质量保证计划对贵公司有益的另一个原因是它改进了资产和资源管理。 与在发现阶段准备的软件需求规范文档一起，质量保证允许企业通过在问题发生之前防止问题来节省时间和金钱。 此外，在创建 QAP 本身时，还有节省时间和金钱的机会。 您可以通过从写作服务评论​​网站Best Writers Online聘请专业作家来外包其创作，他将为您制作 QAP。 通过使用质量保证计划，您的项目团队将更加关注效率和生产力，这有助于就可用资源做出更好的决策。 通过更好的资源管理，您还可以促进创新、实现更高级别的责任感并赋予员工权力。
  • 确认：使用质量保证计划可以帮助企业承认其员工的重要性。 它激发创造力并鼓励项目团队成员之间的协作。 自我反省程度更高，对项目目标的关注度更高。 虽然人为因素并不总是与特定产品的技术方面一样重要，但它对于整个项目的成功以及最终产品或服务的质量仍然至关重要。

为什么质量保证计划对软件公司很重要？

如您所见，使用质量保证计划有很多优点。 当然，质量保证计划可以在不同的环境中使用，但为什么它对软件公司如此重要呢？ 这里只是一些需要考虑的事情：

  • 您的团队将采用 QA 原则作为最终结果的一部分，而不是他们工作的一部分。 换句话说，通过使用 QAP，您可以使其成为项目团队工作中不可或缺的一部分，这会鼓励您的团队将他们的任务视为解决问题的一种方式，而不是再打勾。 动力来自预期的结果。
  • 您的公司将为您的员工创造一个更积极的环境。 质量保证计划非常适合设定目标和定义实现目标的方式。 因此，员工更好地了解他们的角色是什么，并且更有动力去努力工作，因为他们知道他们的最终目标是什么。
  • 您将更好地了解您的使命是什么以及如何完成它。 这似乎并不明显，但拥有 QAP 可以通过为客户提供他们正在寻找的产品种类来帮助您忠于业务目标。 同样，质量保证计划可以帮助您记住您的核心业务价值并在您的团队中维护它们（例如协作和团队合作的文化）。
  • 您的品牌将拥有更忠诚的客户群。 当您继续为您的客户提供高质量的产品时，他们将保持对您的忠诚度，并真正重视您为他们提供的软件。 反过来，这将提高您的品牌声誉，并使您的客户满意。
  • 如果您不将质量保证实施到您的战略中，您可能会遭受长期后果。 例如，如果您的产品或服务有更好的替代品，您可能会开始失去客户。 由于失去客户，您将开始失去收入。

质量保证计划大纲示例

在开始开发应用程序或程序之前，了解质量保证计划的内容非常重要。 如果您仍想自己创建 QAP，则需要了解其关键组件是什么以及它们为何重要。 典型的质量保证计划包括：

  • 一般信息：这包括项目的目的和范围以及所述项目的一般概述。 还应添加任何参考和联系点。
  • 时间表：这是项目的时间表或时间表，其中包含所有任务和职责以及执行者。
  • 文档：这包括与项目相关的任何类型的文档，例如系统文档、分阶段文档等。
  • 审核指南：这些是用于测试产品以及审查和审核项目的指南。 通常，关键组件是审查过程、审计、测试过程和使用的指标。
  • 更正指南：这些是审核后发生的问题报告和纠正措施的指南。 包括任何相关的文档和报告指标。
  • 工具：这些是整个项目中使用的工具和控件以及所需的任何其他资源。

常问问题

如何制定质量保证计划？

创建质量保证计划的过程一开始似乎很有挑战性，但一旦你了解了它的组成部分，它就不再那么困难了。 事实上，您创建和使用 QAP 的次数越多，您就越能理解如何制作一个能让您的项目团队保持正轨的好 QAP。 事不宜迟，以下是您应该遵循的步骤来创建您的第一个质量保证计划：

  • 概述您的质量目标：第一步是为特定项目概述或定义您的质量目标。 如前所述，这些将取决于客户的需求以及您的业务需求和目标。 使用 SMART 方法来定义您的质量目标是一个好主意——具体、可衡量、适当、现实和及时。 您需要精确地使用您的质量标准，以确保它们清晰且可衡量。 请牢记影响您的产品或服务质量的任何政府法规和政策或行业标准。
  • 为团队成员分配角色：下一步是为项目团队成员分配角色。 每个人都应该知道他们的责任是什么，对他们的期望是什么。 在某些情况下，员工需要事先接受培训才能执行他们负责的任务。 您的团队需要能够在任何潜在问题出现之前识别它们，因此需要清楚地了解每个员工在工作中应该关注什么。 这样，可以避免大多数错误，同时正确处理困难的情况。
  • 完成质量保证计划：现在您的 QAP 的两个最重要的方面已经准备好，您可以完成计划。 请记住使用前面提供的大纲，但如果您认为有必要，请不要犹豫对其进行任何调整。 因为这是您第一次创建 QAP，所以如果您犯了错误或忘记了一些事情，也没关系。 将来，您将能够确定问题所在，并在为未来项目创建新 QAP 时考虑这些细节。
  • 实施质量保证计划：一旦您的团队开始从事项目工作，他们就必须开始在实践中实施 QAP。 确保每个人都在同一页面上并且正在履行他们的职责。 再一次，如果在这个阶段有任何错误，重要的是要记住它们以避免将来发生。
  • 评估结果并进行调整：最后，项目完成，产品或服务准备就绪。 在这个阶段，您需要评估项目的结果以及您在实施质量保证计划时执行的 QA 的结果。 牢记所有细节，您需要对 QAP 进行正确调整，以防您将相同的计划用于其他项目。 如果你想为不同的项目创建一个新的质量保证计划，你还应该记住从这个案例中吸取的教训。 请记住，这是一个持续的过程，您当前的结果应该始终影响您未来的计划。

谁应该制定质量保证计划？

在大多数情况下，质量保证计划是由致力于特定产品或服务的项目团队创建的。 该团队通常至少有一名了解必须满足哪些行业标准（质量、安全等）的人员以及了解产品或服务本身的专家。 但是，在某些情况下，项目团队不一定必须自己创建质量保证计划。

例如，如果公司缺乏资源或没有足够的专业知识和经验来制定良好的质量保证计划，公司可能会决定将流程外包。 在这种情况下，您可以从自定义写作评论网站Writing Judge聘请专业作家来为您创建 QAP。 以这种方式外包流程可以帮助减少费用和节省时间，同时确保质量保证计划尽可能有用。

最常见的质量保证计划类型是什么？

没有特定类型的质量保证计划，而是创建这些计划的目的。 例如，一家公司可能会选择创建一个质量保证计划，以便在创建新产品线时使用。 不同的公司可能需要 QAP 来设置特定流程（例如订单交付）或部门（例如客户支持团队）。

显然，根据质量保证计划的目的，其关键要素可能会有所不同。 话虽如此，大多数质量保证计划仍用于确保产品或服务的高质量的主要目的。 在软件开发中，质量保证计划将帮助项目团队创建正在开发的程序和应用程序的最佳版本。

结论

如您所见，使用质量保证计划可能是您始终确保高质量的最合适的解决方案。 项目团队应该开始整合质量保证计划，以帮助他们保持正轨。 使用本文中的提示来帮助您了解如何创建质量保证计划并开始为您的项目创建它们。

Mahmoud Harmouch - Mahmoud Harmouch - Apr 24 4月24日



原文:

SumatoSoft

Posted on May 13

Ensuring good quality of products and services is crucial for companies in all kinds of fields. Poor quality products may result in huge financial losses or even total product failure on the market. According to the research of Consortium IT Software Quality, the estimated total cost of poor-quality software that was canceled, failed, or found no widespread use was about $2.84 trillion in 2018 in the USA only. Addressing the software quality issue increases the chances that money you invest in the software will not be lost. 

Besides, the satisfaction of your customers depends on the product quality and, in turn, your brand's reputation as well. For cloud-based products like SaaS applications user satisfaction is a goal with assigned priority. But how can you ensure high quality at all times? We know that the backbone of quality products is testing. However, we can improve the quality even more if we prepare a Quality Assurance Plan. We gathered everything you need to know about QAPs and how you can start creating them yourself.

What Is a Quality Assurance Plan?

A Quality Assurance Plan or QAP is a type of document which is created and used to ensure that the finished product or service meets the criteria outlined beforehand and thus maintains high quality. In other words, a QAP can help businesses set up a unified list of requirements for their products and then have a specific set of actions that must be performed to meet those requirements or criteria. Creation of Quality Assurance Plan is a part of software quality assurance and testing services. 

In most cases, the criteria or requirements for the quality of the product or service are not only the ones based on customer needs but also the ones based on business goals and needs. The Quality Assurance Plan is meant to guide the project team during the process of creating a product while also helping the team monitor, assess, and report on its quality. Thus, a QAP can be used to report to senior management about the quality of the product being made and the progress of the project team.

A crucial aspect of using a QAP is Quality Assurance or QA which includes the activities that help assess how well the product or service complies with the predefined quality criteria, requirements, or standards. It's crucial to keep in mind that QA is not the same as Quality Control or QC though both are used with QAPs in different ways. While QA aims to prevent issues, QC is used to identify the said issues if they arise (e.g. product defects).

What Are the Advantages of Using a Quality Assurance Plan?

As already explained, a Quality Assurance Plan is used to ensure the high quality of the end product or service. However, using a QAP comes with a number of other advantages, including:

  • Streamlined Production: A Quality Assurance Plan allows companies to better organize their processes and streamline production for huge enterprise systems. In a way, having a QAP allows you to make your processes leaner by stripping away all the unnecessary parts and focusing on the essential aspects of a specific project. In practice, this means that your project team will have better control over the process and will be more engaged as a result. Moreover, there will be an internal system of checks and balances that will help ensure the quality of products or services being created. All the audits can run more smoothly too.
  • Improved Resource Management: Another reason why using a Quality Assurance Plan is beneficial for your company is that it improves asset and resource management. Along with the Software Requirements Specification document that is prepared during the Discovery Phase, Quality Assurance allows businesses to save both time and money by preventing issues before they happen. Moreover, there are opportunities for saving time and money when creating the QAP itself. You can outsource its creation by hiring a professional writer from the writing services reviews site Best Writers Online who will make your QAP for you. By using a Quality Assurance Plan, your project team becomes more focused on efficiency and productivity which helps make better decisions regarding the available resources. Through better resource management, you can also promote innovation, achieve higher levels of accountability, and empower your employees.
  • Acknowledgment: Using a Quality Assurance Plan can help a business acknowledge the importance of its own employees. It stimulates creativity and encourages collaboration among the members of the project team. There is a higher degree of self-reflection and a bigger focus on project goals. While the human factor is not always as important as the technical aspects of a specific product, it is still essential for the success of the project at large and for the quality of the end product or service.

Why Is a Quality Assurance Plan Important for Software Companies?

As you can see, there are quite a few advantages associated with using a Quality Assurance Plan. Of course, a Quality Assurance Plan can be used in different contexts, but why exactly is it so important for software companies? Here are just some things to consider:

  • Your team will adopt QA principles as a part of the end result rather than a part of their job. In other words, by using a QAP you make it an integral part of your project team's work which encourages your team to think about their tasks as a way to solve problems rather than get to another checkmark. The motivation comes from the expected results.
  • Your company will have a more positive environment for your employees to prosper. A Quality Assurance Plan is perfect for setting up goals and defining the way in which they will be achieved. Thus, employees better understand what their roles are and are more motivated to work hard because they know what end result they are aiming for.
  • You will get a better idea of what your mission is and how you can accomplish it. It may not seem obvious but having a QAP can help you stay true to your business goals by providing your customers with the kinds of products they are looking for. Likewise, a Quality Assurance Plan can help you remember your core business values and maintain them in your team (e.g. a culture of collaboration and teamwork).
  • Your brand will have a more loyal customer base. When you continue providing your customers with high-quality products, they will stay loyal to you and will truly value the software you are providing them with. This, in turn, will improve your brand reputation and will keep your customers satisfied.
  • You could suffer from long-term consequences if you don't implement Quality Assurance into your strategy. For instance, you could potentially start losing customers if there are much better alternatives to your products or services. As a result of losing customers, you will start losing revenue.

Example Outline of a Quality Assurance Plan 

Before you start working on your app or program, it's important to understand what a Quality Assurance Plan looks like. Experienced quality assurance providers such as SumatoSoft offer services to help you with quality assurance both during the software development and when the product is launched. If you still want to create a QAP by yourself, you will need to understand what its key components are and why they are important. A typical Quality Assurance Plan includes:

  • General Information: This includes the purpose and scope of the project as well as a general overview of the said project. Any references and points of contact should also be added.
  • Schedule: This is the schedule or timeline of the project with all the tasks and responsibilities as well as who performs them.
  • Documentation: This includes any kind of documentation related to the project such as system documentation, documentation by phase, etc.
  • Auditing Guidelines: These are the guidelines used for testing the product as well as reviewing and auditing the project. Usually, the key components are the review process, the audits, the testing process, and the metrics used.
  • Correction Guidelines: These are the guidelines for problem reporting and corrective action that happens after the auditing. Any relevant documentation and report metrics are included.
  • Tools: These are the tools and controls used throughout the project as well as any additional resources that are needed.

FAQ

How Do I Create a Quality Assurance Plan?

The process of creating a Quality Assurance Plan can seem challenging at first, but once you understand its components, it will no longer be as difficult. In fact, the more often you create and use QAPs, the better you will understand how to make a good one that will keep your project team on track. Without further ado, here are the steps you should follow to create your very first Quality Assurance Plan:

  • Outline Your Quality Objectives: The first step is to outline or define your quality objectives for a specific project. As mentioned earlier, these will depend both on the needs of your customers and on your business needs and goals. It's a good idea to use the SMART approach to define your quality goals -- Specific, Measurable, Appropriate, Realistic, and Timely. You need to be precise with your quality criteria to ensure that they are clear and measurable. Keep in mind any government regulations and policies or industry standards that influence the quality of your product or service.
  • Assign Roles to Team Members: The next step is to assign roles to the project team members. Everyone should know what their responsibilities are and what is expected of them. In some cases, employees will need to be trained beforehand to be able to perform the tasks they are responsible for. Your team needs to be able to identify any potential issues before they arise, so there needs to be a clear understanding of what each employee should be focusing on as a part of their job. This way, most mistakes can be avoided while difficult situations will be handled properly.
  • Finalize the Quality Assurance Plan: Now that the two most important aspects of your QAP are ready, you can finalize the plan. Remember to use the outline provided earlier, but don't be hesitant to make any adjustments to it if you deem it necessary. Because this is your first time creating a QAP, it's okay if you make mistakes or forget some things. In the future, you will be able to determine what went wrong and take into account these details when creating new QAPs for future projects.
  • Implement the Quality Assurance Plan: Once your team begins working on the project, they will have to start implementing the QAP in practice. Ensure that everyone is on the same page and is performing their responsibilities. Everything planned out in the QAP needs to be done in practice now. Once again, if there are any mistakes at this stage, it's important to remember about them to avoid them in the future.
  • Assess Results and Make Adjustments: Finally, the project is complete and the product or service is ready. At this stage, you need to assess the results of the project as well as the results of the QA you were performing when implementing your Quality Assurance Plan. Keeping all details in mind, you need to make the right adjustments to your QAP in case you will be using the same plan for other projects. If you want to create a new Quality Assurance Plan for a different project, you should also keep in mind the lessons learned from this case. Remember that this is a continuous process and your current results should always be influencing your future plans.

Who Should Create a Quality Assurance Plan? 

In most cases, the Quality Assurance Plan is created by the project team working on a specific product or service. The team usually has at least one person who understands which industry standards must be met (quality, safety, etc.) as well as specialists who understand the product or service itself. However, there are some cases when the project team doesn't necessarily have to create the Quality Assurance Plan on their own.

For example, if a company is short on resources or doesn't have a person who has enough expertise and experience to create a good Quality Assurance Plan, the company might decide to outsource the process. In this case, you can hire a professional writer from the custom writing reviews site Writing Judge to create the QAP for you. Outsourcing the process this way can help reduce expenses and save time while ensuring that the Quality Assurance Plan is as useful as possible.

What Are the Most Common Types of Quality Assurance Plans?

There are no specific types of Quality Assurance Plan but rather the purposes these plans are created for. For instance, one company might choose to create a Quality Assurance Plan to use while creating a new product line. A different company might need a QAP to set up a particular process (e.g. order delivery) or department (e.g. customer support team).

Obviously, depending on the purpose of the Quality Assurance Plan, its key elements can vary. That being said, most Quality Assurance Plans are still used for the primary purpose of ensuring the high quality of a product or service. In software development, a Quality Assurance Plan will help the project team in creating the best version of the program and application that is being developed.

Conclusion

As you can see, using a Quality Assurance Plan can be the most appropriate solution for you to ensure high quality at all times. Project teams should start integrating Quality Assurance Plans to help them stay on track. Use the tips in this article to help you understand how to create a Quality Assurance Plan and start creating them for your projects.

Mahmoud Harmouch - Apr 24
item.author: sumatosoft

item.title: 什么是经纪人骗局，您如何避免它们？ | What are Broker scams and How can you avoid them?
item.description:
投资和交易是增加财富的绝妙方式，但并非没有风险。 除了因市场价格波动而蒙受损失的风险外，还有其他风险需要考虑，例如成为经纪人骗局的受害者。 在信任经纪人后赔钱可能是一种痛苦的经历。 没有交易者愿意在这种情况下发现自己。

选择合适的经纪人是交易过程的重要组成部分。 受到监管对经纪人来说至关重要。 一旦您选择了授权经纪人，就不会有经纪人诈骗。

什么是经纪人诈骗？

经纪人诈骗是随着变化而不断发展的假冒计划。 此外，这可能是与网络相关的问题，例如欺诈者使用与冒名顶替者网站无关的合法行业专家的姓名和专业详细信息构建虚假网站。

如果您因经纪人诈骗而赔钱，请不要担心。 近年来已经建立了一些经纪人诈骗恢复公司，以帮助您挽回损失。

如何避免经纪人诈骗：
通过遵循这些步骤，您可以保护自己免于与不道德的经纪人或其他金融专业人士打交道：

避免冷接触：
任何经纪人或财务顾问在未经您许可的情况下给您打电话，而您从未与之有过业务往来，这是您应该避免的。 欺诈者使用电话、电子邮件或信件进行联系。 不要被愚弄； 他们邀请您参加提供免费午餐或其他福利的金融研讨会，以换取您放松警惕和粗心投资。

进行讨论：
您需要经纪人或投资顾问吗？ 与为您提供建议、解决方案和服务的人相处时，您应该感到轻松自在。 问很多关于公司服务和客户体验的问题。

如果您无法得到直接的答案，或者如果对方似乎很匆忙或不愿意为您提供完整和准确的信息，请去其他地方。 记得询问价格、费用和佣金。

做一些研究：
在寻找金融专业人士时，您需要做的第一件事是使用经纪人和公司的名称在网上搜索。 这可能会导致新的官方声明或疑似不当行为或纪律措施的媒体报道，以及客户在互联网论坛、背景信息和其他细节上的评论。 然后直接去找监管机构。 金融专业人士及其公司必须依法向联邦和州证券监管机构注册。 公众可以访问此类信息以及对个人或企业采取的任何纪律措施的详细信息。

检查 SIPC 成员资格：
您还应该检查经纪公司是否是证券投资者保护公司 (SIPC) 的成员。 如果公司倒闭，这个非营利组织会保护投资者，类似于联邦存款保险公司 (FDIC) 保护银行客户的方式。

定期审查您的陈述：
把钱放在自动驾驶仪上是个坏主意。 无论是在线还是印刷版，请清楚地检查您的陈述，以帮助您发现不当行为。 如果您的投资结果不符合您的预期，请提出问题。 如果您无法获得正确答案，请要求与负责人交谈。 永远不要担心显得无知或烦人。

概括：
经纪人诈骗是随着市场不断上升的假冒计划。 为了与您联系，欺诈者利用电话、电子邮件和信件。 不要被误导； 他们会邀请您参加有关公司服务和客户体验的免费研讨会。 将支票支付给 SIPC 成员公司。

定期查看您的报表，无论是在线还是打印，以便及早发现错误。 然后，如果您的投资结果与您的预期不符，请提出问题。



原文:

Investing and trading are fantastic ways to grow your wealth, but it isn't without risk. Apart from the risk of losing money due to market price volatility, there are other risks to consider, such as becoming a victim of a Broker scam. Losing money after putting your trust in a broker can be a painful experience. No trader wants to find themselves in this situation.

Choosing the right broker is an essential part of the trading process. Being regulated is critical for a broker. There will be no broker scams once you select an authorized broker.

What are Broker scams?

Broker scams are impersonation schemes that constantly evolve with changes. Additionally, it could be cyber-related issues, such as Fraudsters constructing bogus websites using the names and professional details of legitimate industry specialists who have no relation to the impostor sites.

And if you lost money through Broker scams, then don't worry. Some Broker scam recovery firms have been established in recent years to help you recover your losses.

How to avoid Broker scams:
By following these steps, you may protect yourself from dealing with an unscrupulous broker or other financial professionals:

Avoid Cold Contacts :
Any broker or financial advisor who calls you without your permission from a company with whom you've never done business is something you should avoid. Fraudsters use phone calls, email, or letters to make contact. Don't be fooled; they invite you to financial seminars that offer free lunches or other benefits in exchange for letting down your guard and investing carelessly.

Have a Discussion:
Do you need a broker or an investment advisor? You should feel at ease with the people offering you advice, solutions, and services. Ask a lot of questions regarding the company's services and client experience.

Go elsewhere if you can't receive straight answers or if the person seems to be rushing or otherwise unwilling to offer you complete and accurate information. Remember to enquire about prices, fees, and commissions.

Do some research:
When looking for a financial professional, the first thing you need to do is search the web by using the broker's and firm's names. This could result in new official statements or media stories of suspected misbehavior or disciplinary measures, as well as client comments on internet forums, background information, and other details. Then go straight to the regulatory agencies. Financial professionals and their companies must register with federal and state securities regulators by law. And the public has access to such information and the details of any disciplinary measures taken against individuals or businesses.

Check SIPC membership:
You should also check if a brokerage firm is a Securities Investor Protection Corporation (SIPC) member. This non-profit organization protects investors if the company goes out of business, similar to how the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) protects bank clients.

Regularly review your statements:
Putting your money on autopilot is a bad idea. Whether online or in print, check your statements clearly to help you catch misbehavior. If your investment results aren't what you expected, ask questions. If you're having trouble getting correct answers, ask to talk with someone in charge. Never be concerned about appearing ignorant or annoying.

Summary:
Broker scams are impersonation schemes that keep rising with the market. To contact you, fraudsters utilize phone calls, emails, and letters. Don't be misled; they'll invite you to free seminars about the company's services and client experience. Make checks payable to the SIPC member firm.

Review your statements regularly, whether online or in print, to spot errors early. Then, ask questions if your investing outcomes aren't what you expected.
