item.title: Docker 删除所有镜像、卷、容器 | Docker remove all image, volume, container
item.description:
在这里，我将写关于删除 docker 镜像、卷和容器的内容。 为此，首先，您需要关闭 docker 容器。

之后，您可以按照以下方法删除所需的东西，

 # To remove all the containers docker rm -f $( docker ps -a -q ) # To remove all the docker images docker rmi -f $( docker images -a -q ) # To remove all the volumes docker volume rm $( docker volume ls -q ) # To delete everything docker system prune -a --volumes



原文:

Here I am going to write about removing docker images, volumes and containers. To do so, first of all, you need to shutdown the docker container.

After that, you can follow following method to remove required things,

# To remove all the containers
docker rm -f $(docker ps -a -q) # To remove all the docker images
docker rmi -f $(docker images -a -q) # To remove all the volumes
docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -q) # To delete everything
docker system prune -a --volumes
item.author: iamtekson

item.title: JavaScript 中的二分搜索算法实现 | Binary search algorithm implementation in JavaScript
item.description:
二进制搜索：- 基于分治法工作的二进制搜索算法。

  • 它用于搜索排序数组中的任何元素。
  • 与线性搜索相比，二分搜索在 O(logn) 的时间复杂度下要快得多，而线性搜索在 O(n) 的时间复杂度下工作。
 function binarySearch(list, item, left, right) { let mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2) if (left > right) { console.log(left, right) return false } if (list[mid] == item) { return true; } else if (item < list[mid]) { return binarySearch(list, item, left, mid - 1) } else { return binarySearch(list, item, mid + 1, right) } } let list=[1,2,3,5,6,7,8,9]; console.log(binarySearch(list,10,0,list.length-1))

欢迎任何意见和建议。



原文:

Binary Search:- Binary search algorithm which works based on divide and conquer approach.

  • It is used to search for any element in a sorted array.
  • Compared to linear search, binary search is much faster with time complexity of O(logn) whereas linear search works in O(n) time complexity. 
function binarySearch(list, item, left, right) {
    let mid = Math.floor((left + right) / 2)
    if (left > right) {
        console.log(left, right)
        return false
    }
    if (list[mid] == item) {
        return true;
    } else if (item < list[mid]) {
        return binarySearch(list, item, left, mid - 1)
    } else {
        return binarySearch(list, item, mid + 1, right)
    }
}

let list=[1,2,3,5,6,7,8,9];
console.log(binarySearch(list,10,0,list.length-1))

Any comments and suggestions are welcome.
item.author: bvnkumar

item.title: 我本周的错误和教训 | My mistakes & lessons for the Week
item.description:
帕特里克·温多

发表于每个人都会犯错，每个人都会学到新东西。 我想我会记录我的。 可能会把它变成一个每周系列。 所以让我们直接潜入。

得到教训

在工作中，我的任务是创建一个控制器，允许不同类型的用户编辑他们的详细信息。 控制器非常简单 IMO，但路由很棘手。 假设我们有两种类型的用户，帝国和叛军，我们想要的是叛军可以去rebels/info并编辑他们的详细信息，而帝国成员可以去empire/info并编辑他们的详细信息。 通常，可以像这样路由它们

get "/empire/info", to: "/user#edit" get "/rebels/info", to: "/user#edit"

这就是我想做的事情。 但这违反了 DRY 原则，并且基于如何为项目配置路由存在很多范围和命名空间问题，因此我深入研究了文档并发现了路由问题

路由问题允许您声明可以在其他资源和路由中重用的公共路由。

所以现在我添加到 routes.rb 文件中的是这个

concerns :info do get 'info', to '/user#edit' end

一旦我们建立了这种担忧，我们就可以在这样的资源中使用它

resources :empire do concerns :info end resources :rebels do concerns :info end

这解决了我遇到的路由问题。

路由问题！！！ 帮助您保持 DRY了解有关疑虑的更多信息

命名空间控制器和 url 生成问题。

这是一个有趣的。 让我解释。 如果你有一个控制器，比如user_controller.rb并且你想在一个与用户没有任何关联的特定命名空间中使用它的方法之一，那么 rails 搜索控制器的方式可能不是你所期望的。 考虑以下两个代码块 1。 

 resources :avatar do get '/owner/info', to: 'user#show' end

第一个块将在 avatar 目录中搜索 user_controller.rb 文件。 即/avatars/user_controller.rb 。 但是 user_controller 不会在那里。 第二个块看起来很相似，除了在传递文件/user#show之前有一个前导斜杠。 这将告诉 rails 覆盖默认值并遵循该路径。
这篇文章帮助我更好地理解它。

犯的错误

刺激反射、类型转换和传递变量。

我有一个表格，我想通过反射更新数据。 我必须将一些变量传递给反射，以便它可以正确处理正在更新的数据。 我传递了我想要更新的对象的 ID，以及一个布尔值，它将决定一些关于如何更新数据的动态编辑。 问题是那个布尔值。 如果你像这样调用反射

data: {reflex: "click -> "Post#save", is_edited: true } #true here is a boolean

当反射获取数据并检查is_edited变量时，像这样

pp "is_edited = #{element.dataset[:is_edited]}" #results in a String

您的日志将返回true
但问题是，从反射返回的true是字符串而不是布尔值。 因此，如果您尝试将其用作布尔值，它将始终返回 true，因为它不是 nil。

这花了我一段时间才弄清楚，因为通常我们会传递对象的 ID，并且 rails 不会区分Model.find(1)和Model.find("1") （至少在我的经验中没有。）所以类型转换从来都不是我需要考虑的事情。 直到现在。

解决方案很简单，

 is_edited = element.dataset[:is_edited] == true

可能是取回布尔值的更好方法，但是通过这种方式，我完全了解了我要检查的内容。

所以现在我知道要记住刺激反射会输入你发送的数据。

结论

这周我学到了很多。 我最终阅读了从上到下在导轨中路由的文档。 经历了一些自我造成的刺激反射错误，并学会了如何覆盖 Rails 中的一些默认值。 总而言之，这是非常令人兴奋的一周。 干杯。



原文:

Patrick Wendo

Posted on May 13

Everyone makes mistakes, everyone learns something new. I figured I would document mine. Probably make this into a weekly series. So let's dive right in.

Lessons learned

1. Rails Routing Concerns.

At work I was tasked with creating a controller that allowed different types of users to edit their details. The controller was pretty straight forward IMO, but the routing is what was tricky. Say we had 2 types of users, the empire and the rebels, what we wanted is that a rebel could go to rebels/info and edit their details and an empire member could go to empire/info and edit their details. Typically, one could route them like this

get "/empire/info", to: "/user#edit"
get "/rebels/info", to: "/user#edit"

and that's what I thought of doing. But it's against DRY principles and also there were a lot of scope and namespacing issues based off of how the routes were configured for the project so I dived deep into the docs and I found Routing Concerns

Routing concerns allow you to declare common routes that can be reused inside other resources and routes.

So now what I added to the routes.rb file was this

concerns :info do
  get 'info', to '/user#edit'
end

once we have that concern built up, we can use it in a resource like this

resources :empire do
  concerns :info
end

resources :rebels do
  concerns :info
end

and that solves the routing problem I had.

Routing Concerns!!! Helping you to keep DRY Learn more about concerns

Namespaced controller and url generation gotcha.

This was an interesting one. Let me explain. If you have a controller, say user_controller.rb and you want to use one of it's methods in a specific namespace that is in no way associated to the user, the way rails will search for the controller might not be what you expect. Consider the following two blocks of code 1.

resources :avatar do
  get '/owner/info', to: 'user#show'
end

2.

resources :avatar do
  get '/owner/info', to: '/user#show'
end

The first block will search for the user_controller.rb file in the avatar directory. That is, /avatars/user_controller.rb. But The user_controller is not going to be there. The second block looks similar except for the fact that there is a leading forward slash before passing the file /user#show. This will tell rails to override the default and follow that path instead.
This post helped me understand it better.

Mistakes Made

Stimulus Reflex, Typecasting and passing around variables.

I have a form, with which I want to update data through a reflex. I have to pass across some variables to the reflex so it can properly attend to the data being updated. I pass the ID of the object I want to update, and a boolean that will decide some on the fly editing on how the data should be updated. The problem is that boolean. If you call a reflex like this

data: {reflex: "click -> "Post#save", is_edited: true } #true here is a boolean

When the reflex gets the data and you inspect the is_edited variable, like this

pp "is_edited = #{element.dataset[:is_edited]}" #results in a String

Your logs will return true
But the catch is this, the true that is returned from the reflex is a string and not a boolean. As such if you try to use it as a boolean, it will always return true, because it is not nil.

This took me a while to figure out because, typically, we pass across ID's of objects and rails does not differentiate between Model.find(1) and Model.find("1")(At least not in my experience.) So typecasting has never been something I needed to consider. Not until now.

The solution was simple enough,

is_edited = element.dataset[:is_edited] == true

probably a better way to get back your boolean, but this way I understood exactly what I was checking for.

So now I know to remember that stimulus reflex will type cast the data you send across.

Conclusion

I learned a lot this week. I ended up reading the docs for routing in rails top to bottom. Suffered through some self inflicted Stimulus Reflex errors and learned how to override some defaults in Rails. Pretty exciting week all in all. Cheers.
item.author: w3ndo

item.title: 如何在 Ruby C 扩展库中定义异常 | How to define exceptions in Ruby C extension library
item.description:
在 Ruby 语言中，异常是通过继承 StandardError 来定义的。

 class NoIndexError < StandardError ; end

那么如何在 Ruby C 扩展库中定义一个异常类呢？

在 C 中定义一个异常类

在编写 C 扩展时，可以用与 Ruby 语言完全相同的方式定义异常。

 VALUE rb_Bio ; VALUE rb_CGRanges ; VALUE rb_eIndexError ; void Init_cgranges ( void ) { rb_Bio = rb_define_module ( "Bio" ); rb_CGRanges = rb_define_class_under ( rb_Bio , "CGRanges" , rb_cObject ); rb_eIndexError = rb_define_class_under ( rb_CGRanges , "IndexError" , rb_eStandardError ); // ...

调用异常

您可以使用rb_raise 。

 if ( RTEST ( rb_ivar_get ( self , rb_intern ( "@indexed" )))) { rb_raise ( rb_eIndexError , "Cannot add intervals to an indexed CGRanges" ); return Qnil ; }

在这里，实例变量@indexd被检查，如果为真，则引发异常。
写一个测试

使用 test/unit，我写了一个测试如下。 它按预期引发了异常。 

 cgranges . index assert_raises ( Bio :: CGRanges :: IndexError ) do cgranges . add ( "chr1" , 10 , 20 , 0 ) end

就这些。 祝你有美好的一天。

罗德里戈·沃尔特·埃雷斯曼 - Jan 16 1月16日



原文:

In the Ruby language, exceptions are defined by inheriting StandardError.

class NoIndexError < StandardError; end

So how do you define an exception class in Ruby C extension library?

Define a exception class in C

When writing C extensions, exceptions can be defined in exactly the same way as in the Ruby language.

VALUE rb_Bio;
VALUE rb_CGRanges;
VALUE rb_eIndexError; void Init_cgranges(void)
{ rb_Bio = rb_define_module("Bio"); rb_CGRanges = rb_define_class_under(rb_Bio, "CGRanges", rb_cObject); rb_eIndexError = rb_define_class_under(rb_CGRanges, "IndexError", rb_eStandardError);
// ...

Call exception

You can use rb_raise.

 if (RTEST(rb_ivar_get(self, rb_intern("@indexed")))) { rb_raise(rb_eIndexError, "Cannot add intervals to an indexed CGRanges"); return Qnil; }

Here, the instance variable @indexd is checked and if it is true, an exception is raised.
RTEST will determine true or false.

Write a test

Using test/unit, I wrote a test as follows. It raised an exception as expected.

cgranges.index
assert_raises(Bio::CGRanges::IndexError) do cgranges.add("chr1", 10, 20, 0)
end

That is all. Have a good day.

Rodrigo Walter Ehresmann - Jan 16

克里斯蒂安·海尔曼

发表于使用快速编辑书签，您可以使任何网站可编辑。 将它拖到您的收藏夹工具栏，单击它，您将进入编辑模式。 您可以编辑、复制和粘贴、删除和其他任何操作。 点击ESC将结束编辑模式。

例如，您可以使用它在截屏之前快速编辑网站。

Christian Heilmann

Posted on May 12

Using the Quick edit bookmarklet you can make any web site editable. Drag it to your favourites toolbar, click it and you get into edit mode. You can edit, copy and paste, delete and anything else. Hitting ESC will end edit mode.

You can use this to quickly edit web sites before taking a screenshot, for example.

item.title: 一家科技公司就像一个足球队。 | A tech company it's like a futbol team.
item.description:
拥有、管理或指导一家科技公司，就像一支足球队。 您有一群人为同一目标工作：

可以赢得比赛或赢得每场比赛。

同样，你的科技公司有一群人在尝试或
为同一个目标而工作：盈利、构建/维护产品等。

你是CEO/CTO，你也是导演，你不玩
直接游戏，但你必须看到一切都在轮子上进行。 您与技术总监签约来管理团队，检查一切，您的其他职责是选择最好的球员，您可以支付的费用。 你试图得到最好的天赋、最好的防守或最好的守门员。

同样，科技公司也有这些需求，可以在您的堆栈上寻找最佳工作元素。 足球的优势之一，就是足球的规则，全世界都一样，在技术 Javascript 或 Python 中

在加拿大、墨西哥或萨尔瓦多也是如此。

然后，当你想更上一层楼，更容易获胜时，你可能会聘请一些外国人来获得实力。

您可以超越自己的边界，从外部获得最好的团队成员。 这样做有一些好处：

  • 忠诚度，因为将获得赞助的人会感谢您为他和他的家人所做的一切努力。

  • 多样性，你会带来另一种风格的打法，你的其他玩家会知道一种新的风格。

  • 顶尖人才，你没有限制在你的联赛中工作的一群球员，你可以选择世界上最优秀的人才。

如果您的科技公司想拥有最好的防御或最好的
进攻。

看看https://visto.ai



原文:

Own, manage or direct a tech company it's like a futbol team. You have a group of person working for the same objective:

Could be won a tournament or win each game.

In the same way, your tech company has a group of people trying or
working for the same objective: make a profit, build/maintain a product, etc.

You are the CEO/CTO and you are the director too, you don't play
directly the games, but you have to see everything goes on wheels. You contract a Technical Director to manage the team, to check everything and other of your responsibility is select the best players what you can pay. You try to get the best talent, the best defence or the best goalkeeper.

In the same way, the tech companies have these needs, to search for the best elements for work on your stack. And one of the advantages of the futbol, it's the rules of the futbol, it's the same around the world, in tech Javascript or Python

is the same in Canada, Mexico or Salvador.

Then, when you want to go to the next level and win easier, you might hire some foreigners to get strength.

You can look out of your border limits to get the best team player you can get from outside. Doing that you have some advantages:

  • Loyalty, because the person who will receive sponsorship, will be thankful for all the effort you did to bring to him and his family.

  • Diversity, you will bring the style of playing from another side, your others players will know a new style.

  • Top Talent, you have not restricted a group of players working in your league, you can select the best talent in the world.

If your tech company wants to have the best defense or the best
offensive.

Take a look at https://visto.ai

item.title: 加拿大科技公司如何聘请外国开发商？ | How a Canadian Tech Company can hire a foreign developer?
item.description:
安德烈斯🐍

发表于如果您是一家加拿大科技公司，并且想聘请一些外国软件开发人员，
你很幸运，你没有处理正常的LMIA：

真的吗？，哦，是的！

您的科技公司可以申请全球人才流 (GTS)计划。
这是仅适用于技术人员的加急工作许可证，最多可能需要 4-6 周。

如果你正在读这篇文章，你想快点跑......

但它们是聘请摇滚明星开发人员的两个主要要求。

  1. 您需要将所有要求结合在一起并提交给 IRCC
    门户网站，如果您做得正确，他们将给出肯定的 LMIA 响应。

  2. 获得 LMIA 后，您需要您的开发人员收集她的主要文档
    提交给IRCC并获得工作许可证。

需要多长时间？ 好吧，取决于开发商的国籍。
可能是可变的。

简单的？ 理论上，一切都在GTS网站上。 但你没有
是时候处理移民（IRCC）或阅读大量未知术语了。

我们开发了一个应用程序，用于自动应用程序准备、跟踪、LMIA 生成、收集

文档等。

古尔山·阿加瓦尔 - May 12 5月12日



原文:

Andres 🐍

Posted on May 13

If you are a Canadian Tech company and you want to hire some foreign software developers,
you are very lucky, you don't have deal with the normal LMIA:

Really?, ooh yes!

Your tech company can apply to program called the Global Talent Stream (GTS).
It is an expedited work permit for tech workers only and can take as little as 4-6 weeks.

If you are reading this, you would like to run quickly....

But they are two main requirements for hire to your rockstar developer.

  1. You need to join all requirements together and also submitted to the IRCC
    portal, and they will be a response with a Positive LMIA if you did correctly.

  2. After having a LMIA you need your developer gather her main documentation
    for submit to the IRCC and get a workpermit.

How long it can take ? Well, depending on the nationality of the developer.
Could be variable.

Easy? In theory everything is on the GTS website. But you don't have
time to deal with immigration(IRCC) or reading a lot of unknown terms.

Here where the https://visto.ai team gain the scene. We develop an application for Automated application preparation, tracking, LMIA generation, gather

documentation and more.

Gulshan Aggarwal - May 12
